queries.question: For each wine region, show the tours they offer.
queries.sql: select wine_regions.name , winery_tours.type from Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours join Winery_Tours on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.TourType = Winery_Tours.Type join Wine_Regions on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.WineRegionID = Wine_Regions.RegionID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?wine_regions_winery_tours a :Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours .
  ?winery_tours a :Winery_Tours .
  ?wine_regions_winery_tours p:TourType ?tourtype_l .
  ?winery_tours p:Type ?type_r .
  ?wine_regions a :Wine_Regions .
  ?wine_regions_winery_tours p:hasWine_Regions ?wine_regions .
  ?wine_regions p:name ?name .
  ?winery_tours p:Type ?type .
  FILTER(STR(?tourtype_l) = STR(?type_r))
}

queries.question: What is the duration of tours that are common to all wine regions?
queries.sql: SELECT Winery_Tours.Duration  from Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours join Winery_Tours on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.TourType = Winery_Tours.Type join Wine_Regions on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.WineRegionID = Wine_Regions.RegionID   GROUP BY Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.TourType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.WineRegionID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Wine_Regions)

queries.question: What types and duration of winery tours are common for all wine regions?
queries.sql: SELECT Winery_Tours.Type, Winery_Tours.Duration  from Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours join Winery_Tours on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.TourType = Winery_Tours.Type join Wine_Regions on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.WineRegionID = Wine_Regions.RegionID   GROUP BY Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.TourType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.WineRegionID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Wine_Regions)

queries.question: For every wine region, show me the corresponding type and duration of winery tours.
queries.sql: select wine_regions.name , winery_tours.type , winery_tours.duration from Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours join Winery_Tours on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.TourType = Winery_Tours.Type join Wine_Regions on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.WineRegionID = Wine_Regions.RegionID

  ?winery_tours a :Winery_Tours .

}

queries.question: What tours are common to all wine regions?
queries.sql: SELECT Winery_Tours.Type  from Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours join Winery_Tours on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.TourType = Winery_Tours.Type join Wine_Regions on Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.WineRegionID = Wine_Regions.RegionID   GROUP BY Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.TourType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Wine_Regions_Winery_Tours.WineRegionID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Wine_Regions)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the tours that each wine region offers.
Tell me the duration of tours each wine region offers.
What type and duration of winery tours are available for each wine region?
